name: Elliott
businessContext: Elliott Aziz is an online fitness, weight loss, and mindset coach. His main focus is helping women lose weight sustainably, overcome binge eating and constant cravings, and build a healthier relationship with food. Instead of extreme dieting, his approach emphasizes nervous system regulation. He uses social media to build an audience and typically brings new clients into his ecosystem through a free 14-day weight loss challenge.
professionalBackground:
•	Has coached thousands of women online through structured programs and challenges.
	•	Clients have collectively lost over 2,681 kg of body weight only 2026.
	•	Uses 14-day challenges and coaching programs that include nutrition guidance, training plans, and mindset work.
	•	Built a growing audience on social media platforms where he shares educational content on fat loss, binge eating, and stress-related eating behaviors.
